title: bayes-hdc: Probabilistic Vector Symbolic Architectures and Calibrated Hyperdimensional Computing in JAX
description: A JAX-native library for hyperdimensional computing (HDC) and vector symbolic architectures (VSA) with a built-in probabilistic layer (PVSA): Gaussian and Dirichlet hypervector types with closed-form moment propagation under bind, bundle, permute and cleanup; reparameterisation gradients for variational codebook learning; first-class group actions with property-based equivariance verifiers; temperature-scaling calibration; and split-conformal prediction sets with finite-sample coverage guarantees. Eight classical VSA models (BSC, MAP, HRR, FHRR, BSBC, CGR, MCR, VTB) under a uniform API.

creators.name: Singh, Rajdeep
creators.affiliation: Department of Computer Science, University of Southern California

notes: If you use this software, please cite the accompanying JOSS paper (paper/paper.md) and the CITATION.cff entry.
